Class SpecialReferenceWrapper

java.lang.Object
recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
recoder.java.JavaProgramElement
recoder.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
recoder.java.reference.ThisReference
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.SpecialReferenceWrapper
All Implemented Interfaces:
KeYRecoderExtension, Serializable, Cloneable, Expression, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, Reference, ReferencePrefix, ReferenceSuffix, TypeReferenceContainer, SourceElement, ModelElement
public class SpecialReferenceWrapper extends ThisReference implements KeYRecoderExtension
